summary: Iteration 29: P0 CONSISTENCY PATCH - ALL 10 CRITICAL FIXES VERIFIED. Backend 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend Playwright tests all passed for TAP flow, TABLE flow, Owner Dashboard, Pulse Bar, KDS, and Menu Sort.

test_1_tap_flow_order.description: TAP page Pay→Tip→Confirm flow working correctly. Confirm Order button is DISABLED (bg-muted, cursor-not-allowed) until payment method chosen. Hint text 'Choose payment method above before confirming' displayed. After clicking 'Pay at Register' → Confirm becomes GREEN (bg-green-600) and enabled. Cancel Order always enabled. Toast shows 'Sent to register — tab stays open. Now you can Confirm.'

test_2_table_flow_order.description: TABLE page Pay→Confirm flow working correctly. Confirm button disabled (bg-muted, cursor-not-allowed) with hint text until Pay at register clicked. After payment → Confirm turns GREEN and enabled. Cancel Order always enabled.

test_3_table_total_matches.description: Backend pytest verified: Table #2 John Smith session total $45.00 = Classic Burger x2 ($36.00) + IPA Draft x1 ($9.00). API /api/manager/table-detail/{table_id} returns correct total matching items sum.

test_4_owner_dashboard_automatic.description: Owner Dashboard (/owner) shows REAL PostgreSQL data: Open Tabs=3 ($77 running), Revenue Today=$22, Guests Today=4, Tabs Closed Today=1, Avg Ticket=$22.00. ARPU=$5.50, Retention=50%. Demo Club Updated venue shows $22 revenue, 3 tabs, 4 guests.

test_5_guest_sync_inside_list.description: Backend pytest verified: /api/pulse/inside returns 4 guests (John, Maria, Kevin, Alex). /api/tap/sessions returns 3 open sessions. All session guests appear in Inside list.

test_6_guest_sync_pulse_bar.description: PulseBarPage (/pulse/bar) shows INSIDE TABS (3): Kevin Brown #125 $17.00, Alex Turner #126 $15.00, John Smith #123 $45.00. All 3 open session guests correctly displayed.

test_7_tips_integration.description: Backend pytest verified: /api/manager/shift-drilldown?kpi=tips endpoint returns tip records from closed sessions with tip_amount in meta.

test_8_owner_events.description: Owner Dashboard 'By Event' view shows BOTH active (green badge) AND ended (gray badge) events. Active: TEST_Event_1772171324.699667, Test Friday Night. Ended: TEST_Event_1772171295.463399, Test Event, TEST_End_Event.

test_9_menu_sort.description: Beers category items sorted alphabetically: IPA Draft $9.00 → Lager $8.00 → Pilsner $8.00 → Stout $9.00. Order confirmed via Playwright text position analysis.

test_10_kds_eta.description: KDS page shows Pending tickets. Clicking 'Start Preparing' opens ETA modal (data-testid='eta-modal') with 'Estimated Time' title, minutes input field, and Confirm/Cancel buttons. Delayed popup also working with 'ORDER DELAYED' message.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 P0 consistency features verified via Playwright)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29: ALL P0 CONSISTENCY PATCH FIXES VERIFIED. (1) TAP flow: Confirm disabled until payment, hint text shown, turns green after Pay at Register. (2) TABLE flow: Same behavior - Confirm disabled until payment selected. (3) Table total = items sum verified via API. (4) Owner Dashboard shows real PG data: 3 open tabs, $77 running, $22 revenue, 4 guests. (5) Guest sync working - all session guests in Inside list. (6) PulseBar shows 3 Inside Tabs matching open sessions. (7) Tips drilldown working. (8) Owner Events shows active+ended events. (9) Menu sorted alphabetically. (10) KDS ETA modal appears on Start Preparing. No issues found.
